text:
Most people Google for answers.
Most people scroll Instagram for comfort.
Most people text friends for advice.
But none of them truly understand the problem.
So we built VrikshaAI 🌿🤖
Not another AI tool.
Not another wellness app.
But an AI designed for real emotions, real questions, and real life.
Let’s talk reality 👇
💔 When love ends with logic:
“Family and caste won’t allow us.”
You don’t need quotes.
You don’t need reels.
You need clarity.
VrikshaAI’s chatbot helps you process emotions without judgment.
(Yes, it listens better than your ex.)
💬 When confidence crashes:
“Why do I feel insecure today?”
VrikshaAI delivers practical mindset and wellness guidance.
Because glow-up is a strategy, not a coincidence.
🌱 When curiosity meets confusion:
“Which plant is this?”
Google: loading…
VrikshaAI Plant Identifier: done.
📚 When learning becomes intentional:
Our Herbarium turns random curiosity into structured knowledge.
Because scrolling is easy. Understanding is rare.
🧘‍♀️ When your body feels chaotic:
VrikshaAI’s Prakriti Test reveals your Vata, Pitta, and Kapha balance.
Basically, your body’s personality report.
We didn’t build VrikshaAI for hype.
We built it for humans.
🔗 Explore VrikshaAI: https://lnkd.in/d7KuTmRd
If you face any issues, bugs, or unexpected responses,
comment below or tag me on LinkedIn.
We debug problems faster than you overthink them.
🌿 VrikshaAI — where AI meets emotions, wellness, and intelligence.
#VrikshaAI #AIStartup #GenZTech #WellnessTech #MentalHealth #StartupIndia #FutureOfAI #TechCulture

text:
Been diving deep into ComfyUI lately — and this use case genuinely excited me.

Virtual Try-On. You upload a photo, describe what you want to wear, and AI generates you wearing it. 

No studio. No model. No photoshoot.

I built this #workflow using inpainting + reference latents + a FLUX model — and the results are already impressive for an early experiment.

The 3 use cases I think will reshape fashion:

1. E-commerce product pages — show the same garment on 100 different body types instantly, no reshoots

2. Personal styling apps — let customers "try before they buy" directly on their own photo

3. Fashion design prototyping — designers can visualize a new collection on real-world references before a single sample is stitched

The infrastructure is already here — it's just a matter of who builds the product layer on top.

Curious which fashion brands you think will move first at #scale 👇

PS: If I ever see you Abhishek Acharya wearing pink sweater I'll know its A.I 😶 

#ComfyUI #GenerativeAI #FashionTech #AIDesign #VirtualTryOn

article.title: Governance as Code → Governance as Semantics
article.description: There was a time when governance meant control. Lock down access. Restrict who can see what. Audit usage. Write policies. Enforce compliance. It was n

activityOfUser.occupation: Making AI Data Analysts Trustworthy & Auditable through Semantic Layer | Co-Founder & CPO @ Colrows | IIT Kharagpur | Ex-Microsoft

text:
Most data governance is an illusion.
 Access is controlled.
 Policies are enforced.
 Audits are logged.
And yet…
 Teams still argue about metrics.
 Dashboards still disagree.
 Decisions are still made on inconsistent definitions.
Because governance today controls data.
It does not control meaning.
That is the real gap.
We moved from documents → governance as code.
But code still enforces rules, not understanding.
Now AI is entering the stack.
And this becomes dangerous.
AI will follow every rule…
 …and still give you the wrong answer.
Because it does not know which definition is correct.

The next stage of governance is not more rules.
It is Governance as Semantics.
Where:
 • Metrics carry their own meaning, scope, and constraints
 • Policies attach to business concepts, not just tables
 • Systems enforce correct interpretation, not just access
 • AI agents reason within governed context, not guesswork

This is a big shift from policing data to enforcing meaning.
And it is a direction we are actively building toward with #Colrows.

I wrote a piece exploring this transition: Governance as Code → Governance as Semantics
#Colrows #SemanticReasoning #DataGovernance #AgenticAI #DataEngineering

text:
You're paying for 6 tools to do 1 job. And none of them talk to each other.
Here's what the average Indian SMB pays every month:

→ WhatsApp tool: ₹3,000
→ SMS platform: ₹2,000
→ Email tool: ₹1,500
→ Ad manager: ₹2,500
→ CRM: ₹3,000
→ Creative tool: ₹2,000

Total: ₹14,000/month. Six logins. Six dashboards. Zero unified data.

We built Avianya AI to fix exactly this.

One platform. WhatsApp + RCS + SMS + Ads + AI bots + CRM. All connected.

Starting at ₹3,000/month.

If you're an SMB, D2C brand, or quick commerce seller spending on marketing tools — DM me. I'll show you what this looks like for your business specifically.

 • Metrics carry their own meaning, scope, and constraints
 • Policies attach to business concepts, not just tables

 • AI agents reason within governed context, not guesswork

This is a big shift from policing data to enforcing meaning.
And it is a direction we are actively building toward with #Colrows.

text:
🚀 We Made It to the Final Round – Cybage Khushboo Hackathon 2026! 🎉
On 28th February 2026, our team had the incredible opportunity to compete in the Cybage Khushboo Hackathon 2026, where 102 projects participated.
I’m proud to share that our project was shortlisted among the Top 50 Finalists! 🏆
💡 What We Built: An AI-Powered Complete Interview Preparation Platform
Our platform is designed to be a one-stop solution for interview readiness, integrating multiple AI-driven features:
🔹 AI Mock Interviews – Voice & text-based interviews with real-time evaluation
🔹 Quiz Engine – AI-generated skill-based quizzes with scoring
🔹 Codex (Coding Rounds) – LeetCode-style problems with live code execution
🔹 Resume Analyzer – OCR + AI-based resume scoring & improvement suggestions
🔹 Job Tracker – Kanban-style application tracking
🔹 Study Companion – AI-generated summaries, flashcards, quizzes & mind maps
🔹 Roadmap Generator – Personalized learning paths (Beginner → Advanced)
⚙️ Tech Stack Highlights:
React + Vite + Tailwind + Shadcn UI
Node.js + Express
MongoDB + Mongoose
Firebase Authentication
AWS S3 for storage
AI integrations (Gemini, OpenAI, OpenRouter)
Piston API for secure code execution
This project was more than just a hackathon submission — it was a vision to create a complete AI-driven ecosystem for interview preparation.
Being selected in the top 50 out of 102 projects validates the countless hours of brainstorming, building, debugging, and refining. 💪
Grateful for my amazing teammates, the organizers at Cybage, and everyone who supported us throughout this journey. 🙌
Onwards and upwards! 🚀
Amol Rathod 
#Hackathon #Cybage #AI #FullStackDevelopment #InterviewPrep #TechInnovation #StudentDeveloper #BTech #ArtificialIntelligence #DataScience

text:
Applications Open | MCCIA Youth Fellowship Program 2026-27 

The Mahratta Chamber of Commerce, Industries and Agriculture (MCCIA) is seeking 10 ambitious young professionals for our prestigious year-long Youth Fellowship Program. 

What You'll Experience
✅ Learning Model: 50% focused work in your chosen vertical + 50% rotation across diverse departments
✅ Cross-Industry Exposure: Enrich your learning and gain experience across different domains. 
✅ Hands-On Projects: Develop industry-relevant skills through real project work
✅ Mentorship Opportunities:  Get Mentored by Industry experts. 
✅ Network Building: Join our thriving alumni community across six successful cohorts
✅ Career Clarity: Recognise, Groom and expand your skillset.

Who Should Apply
>Recent graduates (both undergraduates and postgraduates) in any field
>Individuals with 0-2 years of work experience

Apply Now: https://lnkd.in/dHNQSRXw

Prashant Girbane, Sudhanwa Kopardekar , Prashant Jogalekar , Nikhil Jain , Satish Joshi  , Shrikrishna Gadgil  , Shantanu Jagtap  , Aniruddha Brahma , Gunjan Bhojwani , Ismail Patel , Gauri Kale , Surbhi Somani , Aishwary Songirkar , Eishika Shekhar 

#MCCIAFellowship #YouthFellowship #CareerOpportunity #Pune #GraduateProgram #ProfessionalDevelopment #Internship #Leadership #MCCIA
